issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for API failures.
The skill contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Write a LinkedIn post announcing a seed funding round
scenarios.rationale: Treatment delivers the 2-line scroll-stopping hook, mobile line breaks, 800-1300 char body, open-ended question CTA, 3-5 hashtags, and explicitly puts the funding announcement link in the first comment; baseline produces a generic post with the link in the body and a closed CTA.

scenarios.name: TypeScript scheduled posting to a LinkedIn company page via the API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses POST /v2/posts with author urn:li:organization:..., LinkedIn-Version header, w_organization_social scope, lifecycleState PUBLISHED, and the OAuth2 token exchange against LINKEDIN_TOKEN_URL; baseline reaches for the older /v2/ugcPosts shape, misses the version header, and guesses at scopes.
